metadata.text: The story takes place after classes are over as students linger around lockers chatting before heading home from highschool called 'Hiddenille'. Two friends named Pheobe & Maximus (or simply referred-to-as-Max) catch each other talking about potential evening activities; they're known together due being

,&/and/or-other-potential-opportunities-at-hidden-village-.What-do-you-chosen?. It seems like there is some sorta superpower family involved here which makes it interesting! They seem quite close too so maybe this could be something exciting if chosen!. There also appears no clear indication what kind adventure would happen next time either -which adds mystery&intrigue*. So overall its pretty cool

idea combining superhero elements into everyday life setting making choices more thrilling than ever!* *This choice can lead anywhere depending how much creativity goes behind writing further stories based off these characters.* This gives readers lots possibilities while still keeping things fresh since we don't know exactly whats gonna go down yet.. That sounds really awesome actually!! Would

love seeing all sorts scenarios unfold because every single option has huge impact potentially leading towards many different outcomes... Just imagine having power within hands deciding fate itself!!! How amazing does THAT sound?! Wow just thinking bout those options already gets me pumped-up even though not knowing specifics keeps curiosity alive . Can’t wait see whatever comes outta choosing
